title: File watcher service for monitoring diagram and document changes
purpose: Monitors file system changes in diagram and document directories to notify listeners of creation, modification, or deletion events.
module_context: Exports a FileWatcher class that uses chokidar to watch for file system events in legacy diagram and document folders under the public directory.

steps.content: Configure and start a file watcher for diagram files in the diagrams folder.
Set up event handlers for diagram creation, modification, and deletion.
Configure and start a file watcher for document files in the documents folder.
Set up event handlers for document creation, modification, and deletion.
Store the configured watchers as instance properties for later use.
Close the diagram file watcher if it exists.
Close the document file watcher if it exists.
Stop the currently running file watchers.
Start new file watchers with the current configuration.
Add the provided event listener to the set of registered listeners.
Iterate through all registered event listeners.
Invoke each listener with the file change event.
